matches.summary:
End of an era, in Europe at least.

Nintendo has quietly confirmed that it will no longer sell the original Switch, Switch Lite, and Switch - OLED Model to retailers from mid-February 2027 in Europe.

It has also announced that sales of all consoles will cease on the official Nintendo Store at the same time. This news comes via an
matches.title: Nintendo Will Stop Selling The Original Switch From February 2027
